Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurrences across all cases
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities

Name: Percentage of variants where SW-AE Assign Reviewers appears at least once
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are followed by SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers preceded by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurring after SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur more than once in the same case
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers compared to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur after a reviewer becomes unavailable (SW-Reviewer Unavailable)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are part of loops involving repeated reviewer assignment attempts
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that directly precede SW-Awaiting EIC Decision without intermediate reviewer responses
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in long-running cases (performance > median variant duration)
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants that include SW-AE Recommendation overdue
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are followed within 7 days by any reviewer response (SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Declined' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer No Response'"}"

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants that include reminder activities (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' or activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'"}"

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases resulting in rejection (SW-EIC Reject or SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject' or activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers relative to the total number of reviewer-related activities (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer No Response, SW-Reviewer Unavailable)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Declined' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer No Response' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurring after an editor change (Assign a Different Editor or Unassign Editor)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Assign a Different Editor' or activity == 'Unassign Editor'"}"
